html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Nadia’s shedding has lingered longer than it should because two drivers—emotional stress and a recent medication change—are still active. This plan steadies what’s in her control right now: anchoring restful sleep, calming the body’s stress rhythm, and rebuilding with iron and omega‑3 support. She’s entering the early regrowth phase, when new hairs start taking root 🌱. Step by step, this protocol helps ease the nervous system, create hormonal balance, and turn early fuzz into lasting strength.

Every calm night and balanced meal moves you closer to visible regrowth.
